'''ây-s-k-ng''' ('''kayaskengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuolarize|vacuolarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuolarize|vacuolarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-s-k-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kayaskengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyaskengoko|thiyaskengoko]] || [[word:jiyaskengoko|jiyaskengoko]] || [[word:shiyaskengoko|shiyaskengoko]] || [[word:kiyaskengoko|kiyaskengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyaskengoko|thĂŠyaskengoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyaskengoko|jĂŠyaskengoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyaskengoko|shĂŠyaskengoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyaskengoko|kĂŠyaskengoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
